input.background: A sample of 49 sudden infant death syndrome (SIDS) cases had a mean birth weight of 2998 grams. Based on other births in the county, we will assume σ=800 grams.
input.question: Calculate the 95% confidence interval for the mean birth weight of SIDS cases in the county.

sample_mean_birth_weight.description: The mean birth weight of the sample of SIDS cases.

population_standard_deviation.description: The assumed standard deviation of birth weights in the population.

sample_size.description: The number of SIDS cases in the sample.

confidence_level.description: The confidence level for the interval estimation.

meta_info.caption: SIDS.
meta_info.section: 10.2 Confidence Intervals for $\mu$ When $\sigma$ Is Known
